name: email-mcp
description: Access your email via IMAP and SMTP — search, read, send, and manage emails with full attachment support.
long_description: Email MCP connects Claude to your email account over IMAP (reading) and SMTP (sending). All nine tools are available: list folders, search emails, read email, mark email, move email, send email, reply to email, download attachments, and send emails with attachments. Credentials are collected once via the settings UI and stored securely in the OS keychain.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all IMAP mailboxes/folders available on the account

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search for emails using IMAP criteria. Returns message summaries (no body content).

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a message by UID, including body and attachment metadata.

tools.name: mark_email
tools.description: Set or clear flags on a message (read/unread, flagged/unflagged).

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move a message from one folder to another.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Compose and send a new email via SMTP.

tools.name: reply_email
tools.description: Reply to an existing message, preserving thread headers.

tools.name: download_attachment
tools.description: Download an email attachment to the email base directory.

tools.name: send_email_with_attachments
tools.description: Send an email with file attachments from the email base directory.

imap_port.title: IMAP Port
imap_port.description: IMAP server port (993 for SSL, 143 for STARTTLS)

imap_user.title: IMAP Username
imap_user.description: IMAP login username (usually your full email address)

imap_ssl.title: IMAP SSL
imap_ssl.description: Use SSL/TLS for IMAP (true or false). Use true for port 993.

smtp_port.title: SMTP Port
smtp_port.description: SMTP server port (587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SSL, 25 for plain)

smtp_user.title: SMTP Username
smtp_user.description: SMTP login username (usually your full email address)

smtp_starttls.title: SMTP STARTTLS
smtp_starttls.description: STARTTLS mode: 'true' (always use), 'false' (never use), or 'none' (auto). Use 'true' for port 587.
